description: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) emerged in 2024 as the official token of one of Solana’s most iconic family-friendly NFT series. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 PENGU gives PENGU holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, and staking support, transforming PENGU into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Pudgy Penguins
